title: assignment to member of array of struct not working in some constellations

features.name: array of struct with non-blocking assignment to multiple members
features.description: Code should include an array of struct with non-blocking assignments to different struct members in the same always @(posedge) block

features.name: struct with differently-sized members in for loop assignment
features.description: Code should include a struct with members of different bit widths used inside a for loop with non-blocking assignments to multiple struct members
